risk_if_not_implemented: Without Transparency & Audit, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Continuous Monitoring
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of enterprise-wide monitoring controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Continuous Monitoring (MON-01) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Transparency & Audit (AAT-29.20) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Access Enforcement
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to enforce Logical Access Control (LAC) permissions that conform to the principle of "least privilege."
compensating_control_2.justification: Access Enforcement (IAC-20) provides access control enforcement that compensates for the absence of Transparency & Audit (AAT-29.20) by restricting system and data access to authorized users through alternative identity and access mechanisms. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
